sourceAuthority: non-authoritative evidence snapshot; does not invalidate runtime artifacts or promote Maintainability Graph
createdFor: Actual Representative Runtime Feasibility Demo evidence strengthening
derivationNotes: Impact is manually classified from PP-001 and existing selected-slice links.
Classifications are relative to the proposed title + note meaning, not a confirmed Product Tree mutation.
Existing title-only evidence remains current for the accepted title-only branch but stale or partial for the proposed expanded meaning.
limitations: This is not the output of `pbe impact analyze`.
It does not mark real runtime Evidence or Acceptance nodes invalidated.
It does not prove refreshed implementation or tests exist.

nodeClassifications.reason: PP-001 proposes changing search target from title-only to title + note.
The helper boundary currently owns title-only matching and would need note-content scope review.
Existing work implements title-only search and may not satisfy title + note search.
The existing behavior test verifies title matches, not note-content matches.
Empty query restores the full list regardless of title-only or title + note search target.
No-result behavior likely remains required, but must be reviewed for title + note query semantics.
Automated test output proves title-only checks and is partial for title + note search.
Manual empty-state review may need refreshed review for note-content matching.

nodeClassifications.condition: if PP-001 is confirmed and applied
nodeClassifications.reason: User accepted title-only behavior; expanded title + note behavior requires renewed review and acceptance.

requiredActions: User confirmation is required before PP-001 can apply.
If confirmed, update Product acceptance criteria before revision work.
If confirmed, add or refresh tests for note-content matching.
If confirmed, refresh Evidence and renew user acceptance.
